HEARING RE: DEFENDANT TIMOTHY WEIDNER'S Motion For Terminating, Issue, Evidentiary, And Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff Javier Padilla For Failure To Obey Court Orders.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge, counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Ms. Walsh informs the Court that the parties have reached a settlement. The terms of the settlement are set forth on the record as follows: Plaintiff accepts $80,000.00 in exchange for a general release. Each party to bear their own fees and costs. Plaintiff is responsible for all liens including the $6,700.59 medical lien which is to resolve out of the settlement fund. Plaintiff to provide proof that any former attorney lien as to Alex Carlson is waived. If plaintiff is unable to produce the waiver Ms. Walsh will reach out to Mr. Carlson. Once the release is signed the plaintiff will receive a check within two weeks. Plaintiff then to sign a dismissal within two weeks. (See official court reporter transcript for full details of the settlement.)

The Court confirms that the motion is withdrawn.

Ms. Walsh is advised to provide a notice of settlement to Department 206.
